subject: [SDNC-SDC-DIST] Upgrade sdnc-ueb-list to use kafka native
commit_message:
[SDNC-SDC-DIST] Upgrade sdnc-ueb-list to use kafka native

SDNC ueb-listener to use sdc-distr-client 2.0.0
Use Strimzi KafkaUser template

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ibf2b9becd9795398cad4a812f38b0139624085a2
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1818
